stories.name: whitelist-module-and-central-gate
stories.title: Whitelist module + central rememberContact gate
stories.description: Create app/src/lib/walledGarden.ts with the pure isAllowedDmSender(peerHex, groups, ownPubkeyHex) function. Gate rememberContact() in app/src/lib/contacts.ts so it becomes a silent no-op for any pubkey not in the whitelist. This story establishes the single source of truth for 'who may reach me' and the deepest defence-in-depth chokepoint; S2 and S3 both depend on this story's exports.

includes: app/src/lib/contacts.ts (modify rememberContact to add whitelist gate)

stories.name: ingress-gates-on-inbound-dm-paths
stories.title: Ingress gates on bell watcher and ContactChat
stories.description: Add isAllowedDmSender checks before every side-effect in the two inbound DM subscribers. In directMessageNotifications.ts: gate the kind-4 handler and the kind-1059 handler before rememberContact, incrementDirectMessage, and seenMessageIds/seenRumorIds population. In ContactChat.tsx: gate handleHistoricalGiftWrapEvent, handleKind4Event, handleGiftWrapEvent before appendMessage/upsertMessages, and gate the kind-7 dispatch branch. Remove the bug-documenting comment at ~line 106 of directMessageNotifications.ts. Log every stranger drop at INFO with tag dm:walled-garden-drop.

includes: app/src/lib/directMessageNotifications.ts (modify: add whitelist gate in kind-4 and kind-1059 handlers; remove bug comment ~line 106; add stranger-drop logging)
app/src/components/contacts/ContactChat.tsx (modify: add whitelist gate in handleHistoricalGiftWrapEvent, handleKind4Event, handleGiftWrapEvent, and kind-7 dispatch branch)

stories.name: retroactive-purge
stories.title: Retroactive purge helpers + MarmotContext wiring
stories.description: Add purge helpers: purgeStrangerDmThreads(getWhitelist) in chatPersistence.ts (IDB dm:* key sweep), purgeStrangerDmCounters(getWhitelist) in unreadStore.ts (using clearDirectMessageContact), purgeStrangerDmReactions(getWhitelist) in reactions/api.ts (following clearAllReactions pattern), and purgeStrangerContacts(getWhitelist) in contacts.ts (walks STORAGE_KEYS.contacts and STORAGE_KEYS.contactCache). Wire all four helpers into MarmotContext.tsx: invoke once after group hydration on boot, and re-invoke on every group-membership change event (useEffect on groups/groupDataVersion). Reactivity to join/leave/kick is part of this story.

includes: app/src/context/MarmotContext.tsx (wire purge sweep after boot hydration + on membership change)

stories.name: test-surface
stories.title: Test surface — unit tests, e2e specs, bug-spec inversion
stories.description: Full test surface per DD-7 Option A. Unit tests: walledGarden.test.ts (isAllowedDmSender edge cases), directMessageNotifications.test.ts additions (stranger kind-4 + kind-1059 produce no side effects; member kind-1059 does), chatPersistence-purge.test.ts (seed stranger + member keys, run purgeStrangerDmThreads, assert outcomes; covers unread/contact/reaction surfaces). E2e specs: dm-walled-garden-stranger-blocked.spec.ts (Mallory via USER_C second context, bell stays 0, no IDB key), dm-walled-garden-group-member-allowed.spec.ts (Alice + Bob share group, DM lands), dm-walled-garden-retroactive-purge.spec.ts (pre-seeded IDB, boot, assert Mallory thread purged and Bob thread intact). Invert or delete dm-third-party-inbound.spec.ts per AC-TEST-7.

includes: app/tests/unit/directMessageNotifications.test.ts (modify or extend with stranger/member gate assertions)

invariants: Returns false when peerHex is empty string
Returns false when peerHex (case-insensitive) equals ownPubkeyHex
Returns false when groups is empty array
Returns true if and only if peerHex (case-insensitive) appears in group.memberPubkeys (case-insensitive) of at least one group in groups and neither of the first two preconditions applies
Has no side effects — does not read IDB, does not touch NDK, does not read React state
Returns without mutating storage when isAllowedDmSender reports peerHex as a stranger
Does not throw on stranger input
Does not log an error on stranger input

fields.name: getWhitelist
fields.type: () => { groups: ReadonlyArray<Group>; ownPubkeyHex: string | null | undefined }

invariants: purgeStrangerDmThreads deletes all quizzl:messages:dm:<peerHex> keys where isAllowedDmSender returns false
purgeStrangerDmThreads does not touch quizzl:messages:<groupId> keys lacking the dm: discriminator
purgeStrangerDmCounters calls clearDirectMessageContact for every stranger peer in unreadStore
purgeStrangerContacts removes entries from both STORAGE_KEYS.contacts and STORAGE_KEYS.contactCache for stranger pubkeys
purgeStrangerDmReactions removes quizzl:reactions:dm:<peerHex> keys where peerHex is a stranger
No passing suite run ends with the bug-as-feature assertions (badge>=1 or DM thread renders for stranger) intact in dm-third-party-inbound.spec.ts
The raw-WebSocket publishKind4ToRelay helper is not used in the surviving or replacement spec
